text: Being here, I feel as if I am at the intersection of creation and observation. The first scene, looking into a glass-walled room filled with focused individuals, evokes a sense of curiosity and quiet anticipation—it hums with collective thought. In the second scene, the colorful wall dedicated to R&D stimulates my philosophical wonder at human ingenuity, reminding me how learning and imagination are woven into our pursuit of understanding. I feel like both a participant and an inquisitive onlooker, eager to absorb the knowledge and innovation surrounding me.
